details.text: [✓] Modify apps/web/src/app/App.tsx to add first-time visitor detection
The typecheck passes cleanly. The test failures are all pre-existing (in `VocabularyReview`, `ChatWidget`, `Progress`, AI package tests, etc.) — none related to my changes.

2. **`apps/web/src/features/landing/LandingPage.tsx`** (created) — A welcome component for first-time users with a brief intro to the website and a "Start Your Journey" button that navigates to the main app. The existing full landing page (with Creator, Donation, FAQ sections) remains accessible at `/landing`.

1. **`apps/web/src/app/App.tsx`** (modified) — Added `FirstTimeGuard` component that checks `localStorage` for `hasVisited`. On first visit, sets the flag and redirects to `/landing`. On subsequent visits, renders the main app content as normal.
- ✅ Landing page shown only on first visit
- ✅ Subsequent visits go directly to main app content
